sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74839" key="o)reifoi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρει-φοίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n74839.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mountain-roaming,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0214.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phanocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> :—so <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρείφοιτοι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ποιμένες, ὀρείφοιτα θηρία,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:91:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91.2</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:95:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">95.25</biblScope> </bibl> ; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀρείφοιτοι Βάκχαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
